description: EAST HARTFORD GAZETTE Commander Louis B Fields Air 90 Governor St is Chief of Naval Operations Office the Pentagon Washington DC He is married to the for mer Elian Barkolow and they have five children Elisabeth Louis Jr Jane Nancy and JosephHendy 2nd Commam CONGRATULATIONS TO THE GRADUATES OF 62 MAY YOU BE REWARDED WITH SUCCESS IN ALL YOUR FUTURE EFFORTS Church Corners Inn Inc 860 MAIN STREET EAST HARTFORD CONN Normans Service Sta 1792 Main St East Hartford 2891952 CONGRATULATIONS Jones Automotive Service GENERAL REPAIRING AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSIONS SCIENTIFIC MOTOR TUNE UP ELECTRONIC WHEEL BALANCING GENUINE PARTS GUARANTEED WORK STATE INSPECTION AUTOMOTIVE AIR CONDITIONING 75 CONNECTICUT BLVD EAST HARTFORD CONN S2B2155 L UH rirrw YjlL Any way you say itit means were happy for you CONGRATULATIONS Genovese Excavators 61 Sedgwick Rd East Hartford 5284581 der Fields is the son of Mrs Elisabeth Fields Pvt Barbara A Lamb 52 Oxford Dr has received her discharge from the Womens Army Corps and is expected home this month While in the service Barbara met and mar ried Pfc James D White now stationed in Korea Members Of Graduating Class Continued from Page 4 Ronald Richard Perham Richard S Perkins Phyllis Ann Perotti Glenn
